headline: Another Monday Madness: A Tech Take
summary: U.S.-Israel war on Iran persists, in spite of Trump's signals of potential resolution to which the market has grown thicker-skinned. Read full analysis here.

headline: Analog Devices' Industrial Segment Picks Up Pace: What Lies Ahead?
summary: ADI's industrial segment surges 38% to lead revenues as AI demand, automation and energy trends drive momentum into fiscal 2026.
